parameters: We gardemons are the fastest there are! We'll get you to the
Get your orders from Lord Todeira, then I'll take you straight
All the surviving demons are rallying! Finally, our time has come!
The Remnants were once Apostles of the Demon Lord. Back then,
they used to treat their subordinates really badly.
Nowadays, they watch over and protect us. The six Remnants...
They're the hope of all demonkind.
We aren't going to lose, but I know the humans aren't going to just
The humans outnumber us a hundred to one... Just how long can
We're going to take revenge on the humans for driving us out!
The war with the humans... It's finally starting!
I was born twenty years ago. I've never fought in a battle before.
Is it really difficult? We'll win, right?
Those human worms...! We're going to eradicate them!
The sight of everyone gathered here is burned into my eye.
Many will likely die in this bloody battle. Friends we've known for
hundreds of years will lose their lives.
We'll build our home on the backs of their corpses. The lives lost
here will become the foundation for our future.
I'll once again become terror incarnate. I'll continue to wield my
sword until my very last breath.
We can't stop the Dark Realm's collapse. The land's becoming
We have to take a chance on our survival, no matter how slim that
It's possible to brainwash the humans, but as it is now,
It'd be nice if we perfected it in time, though I wonder if we should.
I'll head straight at the knights' main force and crush them!
I want to taste the full might of Bohelos!
Feel free to find somewhere safe for yourselves! Gwahahahaha!
The Nursery is a facility that uses the Demon Lord's power to
I am able to rebuild the Nursery itself, but I could not reproduce the
If only we could use it in this battle... How very frustrating.
I'm jumping right into the thick of things with Lord Zanaharry!
Hurry up, or we'll finish the fight before you even get there!
Lord Zanaharry's crude and violent, but the regret he feels for his
past defeat means he works extra hard for demonkind.
Lord Mebius is demonkind's strongest swordsman! Not even a
hundred humans could ever come close!
Lord Mebius is going to fight until his last breath in this battle.
Lord Scathach's absolutely ruthless, both to humans and demons.
Even so, beneath the mask beats a heart burning with passion.
At least, that's what I think.
Lady Claura's ingenious technologies are the reason we were able
to survive for so long down here in the Dark Realm.
I don't really want her to go to the front line, but we'll need all of
the Remnants' power to win... Damn it.
Those humans... Death is too good for them! I'm going to skin
How else can I relieve myself of this anger!? Being trapped here in
the Dark Realm... It's like a living hell!
We raised an army and trained relentlessly! Our surprise attack's
going to catch them completely off-guard!
But even if all goes well, the number of demon sacrifices will be
We're not going to lose to the humans, but now's the best time to
say any last words to your friends.
You're the last ones! Glad you didn't chicken out!
The five Remnants are waiting over there! Once you're done,
all that's left is to set off!
We've prepared a path up to the surface. You can use it to get to
You talk to the Remnants like you're their peer... You've got guts.
